tasks.name: Task 1: Dependencies + Commands enum + output formatting module
tasks.notes: Added chrono/csv workspace deps, serde/serde_json/chrono/tokio-rusqlite server deps, created output.rs with 4 formatting functions, expanded Commands enum with 4 new variants, moved --db-path to global Cli struct

tasks.name: Task 2: Wire search, sessions, query, stats handlers
tasks.notes: Implemented open_db() helper, run_search, run_sessions, run_query, run_stats handlers. Fixed --type clap attribute (Rule 1), added tokio-rusqlite dep (Rule 3), added explicit closure return type (Rule 3). All verified with real synced data.

decisions: Moved --db-path to global Cli struct — shared across all subcommands
open_db() checks file existence before init_db — actionable error message
Query subcommand always outputs JSON (no --json flag) — machine consumption
Stats --json outputs single combined JSON object with three keys
csv crate added proactively to workspace for Plan 03

deviations.description: Fixed --type flag: plan specified name='type' but correct clap attribute is long='type'
Added tokio-rusqlite dependency to server crate for conn.call() async bridge
Added explicit closure return type to disambiguate multiple From<rusqlite::Error> impls
